title: Uplift Summary
content:
## 概率

[条件期望与全期望公式 - 知乎 (zhihu.com)](https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/417592820)有错的

[01 条件期望与条件方差 - 简书 (jianshu.com)](https://www.jianshu.com/p/e4c0a6db8a86)

## A Survey on Causal Inference

[因果推断综述解析|A Survey on Causal Inference(6) - 知乎 (zhihu.com)](https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/366740766)

[基于潜在结果框架的因果推断入门 - 知乎 (zhihu.com)](https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/372399985)

## 原理

[阿里文娱](https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s?__biz=MzU1NTMyOTI4Mw==&mid=2247498630&idx=1&sn=b36515e54c2dbc20186942102497c390&chksm=fbd749eacca0c0fc9e285ffc7d06e336115f387394362a4707c71377f02832f8c42bcc71cc7a&mpshare=1&scene=24&srcid=&sharer_sharetime=1585109170232&sharer_shareid=255a68ecb152bdfa3b164d51ce560a8d&poc_token=HLRiK2WjKpUaQQw3Imx3TuOo3a4sQ025dN4gYppc)

[智能营销增益模型（Uplift Modeling）的原理与实践](https://blog.csdn.net/jinping_shi/article/details/105583375)

[整理](https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/442881104)

[模型和Package](https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/349733349)

[具体模型解释](https://www.mdnice.com/writing/1fb9fb09ceb64001b324b465b01c977f)

[pylift实例](https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/442882553)

[资料收集](https://dango.rocks/blog/2018/11/04/Causality0-Collection-of-Study-Materials/)

[因果推断案例集锦](https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/410055461?utm_id=0)

## uplift模型评估

[Anticoder：因果推断--uplift model 评估](https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/343747851)

[uplift模型评估指标及分析](https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/493811028)

## **Uplift特征选择**

- [Deep IV](http://proceedings.mlr.press/v70/hartford17a/hartford17a.pdf)
- [CausalML特征选择工具](https://github.com/uber/causalml/tree/master/causalml/feature_selection)

## **因果推断常用开源库**

- [EconML](https://econml.azurewebsites.net/)
- [CausalML](https://github.com/uber/causalml)
  - [video+introduction](https://medium.com/grabngoinfo/s-learner-uplift-model-for-individual-treatment-effect-and-customer-segmentation-in-python-9d410746e122)
  - [解释](https://www.modb.pro/db/601027)
- [Dowhy](https://github.com/microsoft/dowhy)
- [Pylift](https://github.com/wayfair/pylift)
  - [图解释](https://www.modb.pro/db/601026)
  - [官方](https://pylift.readthedocs.io/en/latest/usage.html)

## Uplift实战

[转行数据分析--6. 如何评价项目收益 - 知乎 (zhihu.com)](https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/164723534)

[两个模型做差分模型、一个模型的标签转化模型](https://github.com/PGuti/Uplift.git)

[两个模型做差分模型、一个模型(加入干预类特征)](https://nbviewer.jupyter.org/github/maks-sh/scikit-uplift/blob/master/notebooks/RetailHero_EN.ipynb#1.1-Single-model-with-treatment-as-feature)

[Propensity Score Matching (Lalonde's Dataset)](https://www.dango.rocks/blog/2018/11/15/Causality1-Playaround-with-the-Lalonde-Dataset/)

title: 亚麻（Amazon）实习经历记录
content:
实习过半，后面要写后端了，防止以后要找工忘了这段实习干啥了，先记一点。

# VAMOS Mapping Service迁移到AWS CDK v2

https://docs.aws.amazon.com/zh_cn/cdk/v2/guide/migrating-v2.html

其他都是内部文档，好多报错文档也没有，只能sage狂搜，搜不到的就看报错改。

且内部项目还有依赖，还得先升级依赖的项目

# VAMOS Data Catalog项目开发

## 流程

#### Requirement Iteration and Solution Pre-study：

Requirement Clarification，Solution Pre-study 

#### Design and Plan ：

Design: LLD，Task Breakdown and Estimation，Setup review meeting for Task breakdown and Estimation，Milestone and Launch Plan 

#### Code Complete：

Set up weblab，security-verify，FE package & pipeline set up，Add navigation bar ，Add data catalog header，Implement of SearchKeyword dropdown，Implement of Pagination and PageSize dropdown，Implement of DataGrid，Update pagination based on the keyword search，Adjust Css，Extend from beta to Gamma and Prod

#### Ready for UAT：

FE dashboard

#### Ready for Lanuch：

Cypress test，UAT enhancement

# TODO

title: 日期模拟
dp
Hello World
content:
Welcome to [Hexo](https://hexo.io/)! This is your very first post. Check [documentation](https://hexo.io/docs/) for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in [troubleshooting](https://hexo.io/docs/troubleshooting.html) or you can ask me on [GitHub](https://github.com/hexojs/hexo/issues).

## Quick Start

### Create a new post

``` bash
hexo clean
hexo g
hexo d
$ hexo new "My New Post"
```

More info: [Writing](https://hexo.io/docs/writing.html)

### Run server

``` bash
$ hexo server
```

More info: [Server](https://hexo.io/docs/server.html)

### Generate static files

``` bash
$ hexo generate
```

More info: [Generating](https://hexo.io/docs/generating.html)

### Deploy to remote sites

``` bash
$ hexo deploy
```

More info: [Deployment](https://hexo.io/docs/one-command-deployment.html)
